response.justification: Bogdan has significant experience in C/C++ (including work at National Instruments) but lacks recent, high-level C++ development in industrial automation or IoT contexts. His expertise leans heavily toward web/mobile development (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and Dlang, with no clear evidence of secure coding practices per IEC 62443-4-1 or experience with industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA). His background in middleware and performance optimization is strong, but the alignment with the role's core requirements is weak.
strengths: Proven C/C++ experience with low-latency and performance-critical systems (National Instruments, Dunnhumby)
Expertise in modern web technologies (TypeScript, React, Node.js) and scalable architectures
Strong focus on software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, clean code practices)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT, or cloud platforms (Azure) as per job requirements
Lacks explicit secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443-4-1 experience
Limited recent C++ work; current stack diverges from the role's core technical competencies

key_factors.factor: C++ and STL expertise in industrial/automation context
Cloud and industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA)
